section_id: Section on Skills Test and Medical Examination
title: Skills Test and Medical Examination for Overseas Employment
content: All overseas Filipino workers (OFWs) are required to undergo a skills test and a medical examination as part of the pre-employment process. The skills test ensures that the worker possesses the necessary qualifications and competencies for the job abroad. The medical examination certifies that the worker is physically and mentally fit for overseas employment, free from communicable diseases, and meets the health standards set by the receiving country and the Philippine Overseas Employment Administration (POEA). These requirements are mandatory to protect the welfare of OFWs and to comply with international labor standards.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
